title: Secondary English Teacher
description:
Work Time: 9:00 am-6:00 pm (one day off on weekday, one day off on weekend)

l  Deliver English courses to students of designated age groups (e.g., secondary school students, exam candidates) in line with the teaching syllabus and students' learning needs.

l  Prepare lesson plans, teaching materials and interactive activities to enhance students' learning interest and academic performance.

l  Assess students' learning progress regularly, provide timely feedback to students and parents, and adjust teaching strategies accordingly.

l  Participate in teaching training, lesson observation and curriculum development activities organized by the school/center.

l  Maintain good communication with parents, answer their questions about students' learning, and build a positive home-school cooperation relationship.

l  Abide by the school's teaching management system and contribute to creating a positive teaching environment.

postedCompany.description:
Singapore Sihai International Education is a prestigious educational institution rooted in Singapore's vibrant and diverse educational landscape, dedicated to bridging global learning resources and nurturing cross-cultural talents with international competitiveness.

With a team of experienced educators and industry experts, we offer a comprehensive range of educational programs tailored to students of different age groups and academic needs. Our core offerings include international curriculum tutoring (such as IB, IGCSE, and A-Level), Singapore local school application guidance, bilingual immersion programs, and study-abroad consulting services. We adhere to the concept of "student-oriented, quality-first", focusing on developing students' critical thinking, innovative ability, and global perspective while consolidating their academic foundation.

Leveraging Singapore's unique advantage as an international education hub, we have established in-depth cooperation with local renowned schools and global educational institutions. This enables us to provide students with authentic learning experiences, including school immersion activities, cross-cultural exchange programs, and internship opportunities in international enterprises. We also pay close attention to the individual growth of each student, offering personalized academic planning and one-on-one counseling to help them clarify their learning goals and realize their potential.

At Singapore Sihai International Education, we believe that education is not only about knowledge imparting but also about character shaping. We are committed to creating a positive and inclusive learning environment, guiding students to respect cultural differences, cultivate a sense of social responsibility, and grow into caring and responsible global citizens. Whether you are preparing to study in Singapore, pursue international curriculum certification, or enhance your cross-cultural communication skills, Sihai International Education is your reliable partner on the journey of educational growth.
postedCompany.name: SIHAI INTERNATIONAL EDUCATION PTE. LTD.
